# Azion Docs — deploy

> All pages of the deploy section. Root index: https://www.azion.com/en/llms.txt

- [Explore Azion Deploy products](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/): Run your applications anywhere: on Azion’s highly distributed network, on multi-cloud, or on-premises.
- [Orchestrator](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/): Azion Orchestrator is an end-to-end encrypted orchestration service with cloud management and zero-touch provisioning, created for large-scale Edge networks. Manage and control resources on the edge in real time and orchestrate your services quickly and easily to meet your needs.
- [Automate infrastructure with Azion API](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/api/): Explore Azion's API for seamless automation of edge services and nodes, designed to boost developer experience and resource management.
- [How to authorize an edge node](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/authorize-an-edge-node/): Learn how to authorize and deploy Edge Nodes using Azion Console and API for optimal Edge Services integration and Orchestrator.
- [How to bind an edge service to an edge node](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/bind-service-node/): Learn how to deploy and manage Edge Services via Azion API and Azion Console, effectively binding services to edge nodes for optimized performance.
- [How to create an edge service](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/create-edge-service/): Learn to create and deploy edge services using Azion Console and API, configuring resources and activating with ease for efficient edge node deployment.
- [How to deploy a service](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/deploy-a-service/): Explore the comprehensive guide on using Orchestrator for real-time management and deployment of edge services and resources, featuring step-by-step instructions.
- [Edge Node first steps](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/edge-node-first-steps/): First steps to work with Azion Edge Node.
- [Creating an Edge Service](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/edge-services-first-steps/): First steps to work with Azion Edge Services.
- [Explore Orchestrator](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/explore-usage/): Discover commands and features of Azion Orchestrator Agent, including installation, logs, and terminal commands to enhance device functioning.
- [How to install Orchestrator Agent](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/install-orchestrator-agent/): Learn how to download and install the Azion Orchestrator for various OS like Linux, FreeBSD, and MacOS, including command line instructions.
- [How to provision files](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/provision-files/): Learn how to configure and deploy resources via Azion Console and API, manage edge services, and effectively use edge nodes and orchestrators.
- [How to run scripts on edge nodes](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/run-scripts/): Learn how to configure and install Azion CLI on edge nodes using Shell Script resources via Azion Console and API, including service binding and setup.
- [How to unbind an edge service](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/unbind-service/): Learn how to unbind services from edge nodes using the Azion Console and API, with detailed steps on execution of DELETE requests through Curl commands.
- [How to uninstall Orchestrator Agent](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/uninstall-agent/): Learn how to uninstall Azion Orchestrator Agent and delete edge nodes via the Azion console or API, including steps for secure node removal.
- [How to watch Orchestrator logs](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/watch-logs/): Learn to manage your edge node and service logs with the Orchorstrator Agent, including deployment and troubleshooting.
- [How to work with variables](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/work-with-variables/): Explore how to utilize variables in Orchestrator with Azion Console and API to manage and override edge service and node variables effectively.
- [Automate the deployment with zero-touch provisioning](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/guides/zero-touch-provisioning/): Explore Azion Orchestrator for automated deployment and zero-touch provisioning across on-premises, multi-cloud, and IoT platforms.
- [Azion Edge Node](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/reference/edge-node/): Azion Edge Node enables you to create your own edge infrastructure, allowing you to install services and resources in real time.
- [Azion Edge Services](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/orchestrator/reference/edge-services/): Azion Edge Services is a module for the Orchestrator product that allows orchestrated services to be managed within your own edge infrastructure.
- [Deploy Overview](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/deploy/overview/): Azion Deploy products are designed to enhance the efficiency of managing edge resources in real time.
